title: medicago × varia f. ambigua
intro: Medicago × varia f. ambigua is a plant species, also known as 'wild medic', which is a hybrid of the common bird's-foot trefoil (Medicago sativa) and the broad-leaved bird's-foot trefoil (Medicago falcata var. varia). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of isoflavones, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Medicago × varia f. ambigua include its potential to reduce menopausal symptoms, improve bone density, and support cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a dried herb or in the form of capsules or extracts, and can be consumed as a tea or added to foods as a nutritional supplement.
